title: microsorum heterolobum
intro: Microsorum heterolobum, also known as Pilea microsora or Pilea heteroloba, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Microsorum heterolobum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various diseases.
